name: Balloon
description: A sky of party balloons bobbing on their strings — each redraw floats them to new heights and lets the strings sway.

code.style: --skin: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --sway: @rand(-9deg, 9deg); --rule: ( /* balloon and string share one emitted altitude so the string stays tied */ --by: @r(2, 26); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 28%; width: 44%; top: calc(@var(--by) * 1%); height: 50%; border-radius: 50% 50% 46% 46% / 56% 56% 42% 42%; background: var(--skin); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 49%; width: calc(28px / @Y); top: calc(@var(--by) * 1% + 49%); height: 30%; border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(60, 60, 70, 0.5); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(var(--sway)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
